title: Catalog Platform Enablement
description: Platform-wide modernization of the enterprise catalog system, including new microservices, APIs, and infrastructure
longDescription:
Led platform-wide modernization of the enterprise catalog system, a critical component supporting downstream ordering and provisioning systems. The initiative included designing and implementing new microservices to enhance catalog functionality and re-architecting CI/CD pipelines to improve deployment efficiency.

The project resulted in improved system reliability, accelerated release velocity, and strengthened compliance posture. The new architecture supports future scalability and innovation while maintaining high standards for code quality and operational excellence. Additionally, I helped integrate major system upgrades, infrastucture, and security controls with passwordless SSO. These efforts saw a 60% faster data processing and 53% faster publishing performance with zero downtime or rollbacks during the transition.
highlights: Increased data processing speed by 60%
Increased publishing performance by 53%
Opened the platform for future innovation and scalability
Completed with zero downtime or rollbacks

title: Natual Language Querying for Catalog Data
description: Supporting business users and developers in interacting with catalog data using conversational language through AI-powered natural language querying capabilities.
longDescription:
Designed and implemented AI-powered natural language querying capabilities for the enterprise catalog system, enabling business users and developers to interact with catalog data using conversational language.

The solution leverages OpenAI, Claude, and Snowflake language models to interpret user queries and translate them into structured database queries. This allows users to ask complex questions about catalog data without needing to understand the underlying data schema or write SQL or structure API calls. The integration has significantly improved accessibility and usability of catalog data, empowering teams to make data-driven decisions more efficiently and limit support request to the development team to generate more complex queries.
highlights: Supported business users and developers in interacting with catalog data using conversational language
Increased accessibility and usability of catalog data
Enabled user driven analytics and insights

title: Cloud-Native Payment Transaction Growth
description: Re-architecting the CP Pay payments platform to a cloud-native architecture, enabling it to handle 500% transaction growth while improving performance and reliability.
longDescription:
Led the re-architecture of the CP Pay payments platform to a cloud-native architecture, enabling it to handle 500% transaction growth while improving performance and reliability. The modernization effort included migrating the platform to Azure and adopting a microservices architecture.

The new architecture has significantly improved the scalability and resilience of the payments platform, allowing it to efficiently handle increased transaction volumes while maintaining high availability. Additionally, the modernization has enabled faster development cycles and easier maintenance, positioning CP Pay for continued growth and innovation in the local government payments space.
highlights: Handled 500% transaction growth
Improved performance and reliability
Enabled faster development cycles and easier maintenance
Positioned CP Pay for continued growth and innovation
Migrated to Azure and adopted microservices architecture

title: Establishing a Standardized UI Component Library for CivicEngage
description: Utilizing React and TypeScript to create a standardized UI component library for CivicEngage, improving consistency and developer efficiency across the platform.
longDescription:
Established a standardized UI component library for CivicEngage using React and TypeScript, improving consistency and developer efficiency across the platform. The library includes a wide range of reusable components that adhere to accessibility standards and design guidelines.

The implementation of the UI component library has led to faster development cycles, improved user experience, and a more cohesive look and feel across the CivicPlus and CivicEngage platforms. It has also facilitated better collaboration between design and development teams, ensuring that new features are implemented with a consistent visual language and high-quality user interface across dozens of applications.
highlights: Improved consistency and developer efficiency across the platform
Faster development cycles and improved user experience
More cohesive look and feel across the CivicPlus and CivicEngage platforms

title: Next Generation Navigation SDK for Garmin Gemini
description: Developed the next generation navigation product for Garmin. A high-performance 3D navigation core built on a flexible, modular architecture.
longDescription:
Developed the next generation navigation product for Garmin, a high-performance 3D navigation core built on a flexible, modular architecture. The new navigation SDK provides enhanced performance, improved accuracy, and a richer set of features for developers building navigation applications on Garmin devices and Automotive OEM applications.

The project involved designing and implementing a scalable architecture that can handle complex navigation scenarios while maintaining low latency and high reliability. The SDK includes abstracting advanced routing algorithms, real-time traffic updates, and support for various map data formats. It has been successfully integrated into Garmin's automotive OEM market offerings, providing a superior navigation experience for users.
highlights: Introduced high-resolution 3D building rendering
Flexible, modular architecture for navigation SDKs
Integrated into various OEM in-vehicle Applications
OTA Updates for navigation features and map data

title: Garmin Integrated into Honda Infotainment Systems
description: Garmin's navigation technology integrated into various Honda vehicle infotainment systems, providing millions of installations worldwide with high user satisfaction and positive reviews.
longDescription:
Garmin's navigation technology has been integrated into various Honda vehicle infotainment systems, providing millions of installations worldwide with high user satisfaction and positive reviews. The partnership between Garmin and Honda has resulted in a seamless navigation experience for drivers, with features such as real-time traffic updates, voice-guided directions, and intuitive user interfaces.

The integration of Garmin's navigation technology into Honda's infotainment systems has been well-received by users, contributing to the overall appeal and functionality of Honda vehicles. This collaboration has strengthened Garmin's presence in the automotive market and showcased the company's commitment to delivering high-quality navigation solutions for drivers around the world.
highlights: Integrated into various Honda vehicle infotainment systems
Millions of installations worldwide
High user satisfaction and positive reviews
